cement_equivalent.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited cement-equivalent output anchor from the Phase 1 calibration build.

commercial_building_services.provenance_note: Australian Energy Update 2025 Table 5 / Table 11 — Aligned to 2023–24 commercial final energy use as the incumbent service-demand anchor.

commercial_other.provenance_note: Migrated residual calibration layer — Commercial other uses a residual_activity anchor of 1; quantities live on the residual incumbent method.
